title: Daggers & Knives
description: Adds daggers & knives to the game!
body:
This mod adds Daggers and Knives to the game!  
And yes, its made **by me only!** _(Yes, really!)_

[![Download on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/oofs-daggers)

[![Download on CurseForge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daggers-knives-mod)

***

Current weapons:  
Netherite Knife  
Dagger  
Knife, Wooden Knife, Stone Knife, Gold Knife,
Diamond Knife, Chainsaw

***

Netherite Knife:  
Improved attack damage & attack speed  
Lava/fire resistance

Dagger:  
High attack speed, small damage though

Knife:  
High damage, not much attack speed

***

More is coming soon as it's not finished yet, several things can be added over time but it is usable in survival and functional, there may be changes or additions at any time! :)

And thanks to anyone that used this mod! Feedback is really appreciated :)
